title: Danh động từ & Nguyên mẫu (2) — Danh động từ & So sánh
topic: Danh động từ & Nguyên mẫu (Gerund & Infinitive)
summary: Danh động từ (V-ing): chức năng, các động từ đi kèm, so sánh Gerund vs Infinitive (remember, stop, try…).

sections.heading: IV. Bản chất và Các dạng của Danh động từ (Gerund)
sections.body:
Danh động từ là động từ thêm đuôi -ing (V-ing), đóng vai trò và có chức năng như một danh từ.
Các dạng của danh động từ:

**1. V-ing (Danh động từ đơn): Ví dụ: 'I like making cake.'**

**2. Having Vpp (Danh động từ hoàn thành) - Nhấn mạnh hành động đã hoàn tất trong quá khứ trước một thời điểm khác: Ví dụ: 'He denied having stolen the money.'**

**3. Being Vpp (Danh động từ bị động): Ví dụ: 'She avoided being looked at.'**

sections.heading: V. Chức năng của Danh động từ (Gerund)
sections.body:
**1. Làm chủ ngữ (Subject):**
- Ví dụ: 'Becoming a teacher is my hobby.'
- Ví dụ: 'Speaking English is easy.'
- Ví dụ: 'Dancing bores him.'

**2. Làm vị ngữ (Predicate):**
- Ví dụ: 'My father’s work is repairing electric device.'
- Ví dụ: 'What I have to do now is cooking my dinner.'

**3. Thành lập danh từ ghép (Compound Nouns):**
- Ví dụ: 'A reading lamp = A lamp for reading' (đèn đọc sách).
- Ví dụ: 'A diving board = A board for diving' (ván nhảy).

**4. Theo sau giới từ (Prepositions):**
- Ví dụ: 'He was accused of smuggling.' / 'There is no interest in writing letters.'
- Ví dụ: 'I gave up doing exercises everyday last week as I have no time.'

**5. Theo sau một số động từ nhất định (V + V-ing):**
- Ví dụ: 'We discussed selling the old car.' / 'He admitted cheating on the test.'
- Động từ thường gặp: Admit (thú nhận), Appreciate (cảm kích), Avoid (tránh), Delay (trì hoãn), Deny (phủ nhận), Discuss (thảo luận), Enjoy (thích thú), Imagine (tưởng tượng), Involve (có liên quan), Keep (tiếp tục), Mention (đề cập), Mind (phiền), Miss (bỏ lỡ), Postpone (trì hoãn), Practice (thực hành), Recall (nhớ lại), Recollect (nhớ lại), Report (báo cáo), Resent (bất bình), Resist (kháng cự), Risk (liều lĩnh), Suggest (đề nghị), Tolerate (chịu đựng).

**6. Theo sau nhóm động từ tri giác chỉ hành động đang tiếp diễn tại một thời điểm (một phần hành động):**
- Ví dụ: 'I saw him crossing the street.' (Tôi thấy anh ta khi đang băng qua đường).
- Ví dụ: 'When I arrived, I heard my sister talking about her boyfriend.'
- Ví dụ: 'He felt the sweat running down his face.'
- Ví dụ: 'She watched the kids playing in the yard.'

sections.heading: VI. So sánh cách dùng Gerund và Infinitive
sections.body:
| Động từ | + To V / Bare V | + V-ing |
|---|---|---|
| Nhóm động từ tri giác (see, hear, feel, watch, notice) | V_bare: Chỉ sự hoàn tất của hành động, xem/nghe toàn bộ quá trình. Ví dụ: 'Mary heard the boy cough.' | V-ing: Chỉ sự tiếp diễn của hành động, xem/nghe một phần hành động đang xảy ra. Ví dụ: 'They saw the thief breaking into the house.' |
| Advise, recommend, allow, permit, encourage, require | Có tân ngữ + To V (V + O + To V). Ví dụ: 'They do not permit us to smoke here.' | Không có tân ngữ + V-ing (V + V-ing). Ví dụ: 'They do not permit smoking here.' |
| Remember, forget | + To V: Nhớ/quên phải làm gì ở tương lai/hiện tại. Ví dụ: 'Remember to call Peter.' | + V-ing: Nhớ/quên một việc đã làm trong quá khứ. Ví dụ: 'I remember calling Peter yesterday.' |
| Stop | + To V: Dừng việc này lại để làm việc khác. Ví dụ: 'He stopped to refill the fuel tank because there was very little fuel left.' | + V-ing: Thôi không làm hành động đó nữa. Ví dụ: 'He stopped refilling the fuel tank because it was full.' |
| Try | + To V: Cố gắng, nỗ lực làm gì. Ví dụ: 'He always tried to learn better.' | + V-ing: Thử làm gì, trải nghiệm xem thế nào. Ví dụ: 'John isn't here. Try phoning his home number.' |
| Mean | + To V: Có ý định, dự định làm gì. Ví dụ: 'I meant to go earlier but the alarm clock didn’t go off.' | + V-ing: Có nghĩa là, mang lại kết quả là. Ví dụ: 'This new order will mean working overtime.' |
| Need | + To V: Mang nghĩa chủ động (Ai đó cần làm gì). Ví dụ: 'You need to do everything with care.' | + V-ing: Mang nghĩa bị động (Cái gì cần được làm). Ví dụ: 'Everything needs doing with care.' |
| Keep, go on, continue | + To V: Chỉ sự thay đổi hành động (làm tiếp việc khác). Ví dụ: 'She stopped talking about that and went on to describe her other problems.' | + V-ing: Chỉ sự liên tục của cùng một hành động. Ví dụ: 'She went on talking about her illness until we all went to sleep.' |
| Begin, start, like, love, hate | Có thể đi kèm cả To V hoặc V-ing mà không có sự khác biệt nhiều về nghĩa. | I began to learn English three years ago. = I began learning English three years ago. / They like dancing. = They like to dance. |

exerciseSets.title: Danh động từ 3 (Luyện tập & Thi online - 30 câu)

exercises.question: I didn't feel like ________ so I suggested ________ the day in the garden.
Why do you keep ________ back? Are you afraid of ________ followed?
I’m sorry for ________late.
It's no use ________ ________ him. You'll have ________ till he stops ________

options.text: trying to interrupt / to wait / talking
to try to interrupt / to wait/ to talk
trying interrupting / to wait / to talk

exercises.question: I remember ___________ about the earthquake in the papers.
Why didn't you drink it?-I didn't like ________ it as I didn't know what it was.
I keep ______ _____ mayonnaise but I never succeed. ~Try ________ the yolk of a hard-boiled egg
I liked ________ to folk music much better than ________ to pop.
The car began ________ an extraordinary noise so I stopped ________ what it was.
You'll never regret ________ a kind action
She entered the room without ___________
She apologized for ________ my sewing-machine without ________ permission and promised never ________ it again.

options.text: to borrow / to ask / to do

exercises.question: I didn't mean ________ anyone but somehow I succeeded in ________ them all.
The police accused him of ________ fire to the building but he denied ________ in the area on the night of the fire.
The snow kept ________ and the workmen grew tired of ________ ________ the roads clear.

options.text: to avoid to be / to be / to wait
avoiding to be / being / to wait

exercises.question: I wish my refrigerator would stop ________ that horrible noise. You can't hear anyone ________
This book tells you how ________ at games without actually ________
Why did you go all round the field instead of ________ across it? ~I didn't like ________ it because of the bull. I never see a bull without ________ that it wants ________ me.

options.text: walking/ to cross / think / to chase
to walk / to cross/ to think / to chase

exercises.question: Ask him ________ in. Don't keep him ________ at the door
Jim stopped _________ his shoelace. Wait for him.
Mr. Harris enjoys _________ people out to dinner.
He suggested _________ out for dinner.
Dan enjoys _____ science fiction.
Cheryl suggested ______ a movie after work.
I miss _______ in the travel industry. Maybe I can get my old job back.
Do you mind _________ me translate this letter?
You've never mentioned _______ in Japan before. How long did you live there?
If he keeps ______ to work late, he's going to get fired! (come )
Mr Backer’s children are busy ______ stamps for their club.

exerciseSets.title: Động từ nguyên mẫu và Danh động từ 1 (Thi online - 30 câu)

exercises.question: Most people prefer _____ money ________ it.
I resented ______unjustly accused and asked him _______.
It isn't good for children ________ too many sweets
I'm very sorry for ________ late. It was good of you ________ for me.
Do you feel like ________ to a film or would you rather ________ at home?
He decided ________ broken glass on top of his wall ________ boys ________ over it
John was an efficient worker, but his attitude towards his colleagues and his constant lateness resulted in his ____________.
He kept _____ up and ___ for an explanation and she didn't know what_____ about him.

options.text: to ring/ to ask/ to do

exercises.question: We got tired of ____for the weather ________ and finally decided _____out in the rain.
He never thinks of ___ out of your way; he expects you _____ round him
She claimed ________ the future by ____ into her crystal ball.

options.text: to be able to tell / gazing
to be able telling / to gaze
to be able to tell / to gaze

exercises.question: I left my door open. Why didn't you walk in? ~I didn't like _____ in when you weren't there
Would you mind _______ your pet snake somewhere else?
I'd rather ______ my living by _____floors than _____ money by ____ people.

options.text: to earn/ to scrub/ to make/blackmail

exercises.question: He heard the clock ____six and knew that it was time for him ____ up.
I can hear the bell ____ but nobody seems _______ the door

options.text: ringing/ to be coming to open
to ring/ to be coming opening
to ring/ to be coming to open

exercises.question: It is easy _____ animals on the road in daylight but sometimes at night it is very difficult __________ them
When at last I succeeded in _____him that I wanted _____ home quickly, he put his foot on the accelerator and I felt the car leap forward.
I'm not used to ____on the left. -When you see everyone else ____ it you'll find it quite easy _____ yourself.
It is pleasant ___by the fire at night and ____the wind ____ outside.
There was no way of _____ out of the building except by _______down a rope and Ann was too terrified _____this
It's no good ______ to him; he never answers letters. The only thing ____is ____ and _____ him.

options.text: to write/ to do/ going/ to see
writing/ to do/ to go/ to see

exercises.question: The people in the flat below seem _________ a party. You can hear the champagne corks ______ against their ceiling
The boys next door used ________ and _____ model aero planes, but they seem to have stopped _____ that now.

options.text: to like to make/ fly/ to do
to like making / flying/ to do
to like to make/ fly / doing

exercises.question: I knew I wasn't the first ____, for I saw smoke ___ from the chimney.
It is very unpleasant ______ up and _____the rain ____ on the windows.

options.text: to wake/ to hear/ to beat

exercises.question: There are people who can't help ____ when they see someone _____on a banana skin
Alan can’t stand _________ on trains.
As the famous saying goes, there’s no use ______ over spilt milk.
Don’t waste my time ___________ about your salary.

exerciseSets.title: Động từ nguyên mẫu và Danh động từ 2 (Thi online - 30 câu)

exercises.question: It's very kind of you _______ me with my housework.
It is no use _________ a lot of alcoholic drinks.
We are looking forward _________ from you next week.
Would you mind _________ me to school?
It 's no use _________ for her too long.
It isn’t good for children _________ too many sweets.
I could not help _________ that you said.
It is interesting _________ the history of today’s motion-picture industry.
I’d love _________ an opportunity of _________ you again.
We regret _________ that the lecture was dull and wasn’t worth _______ to.
Where there is work _________ you should be ready _________ a hand.
It is no good _________ him _________ you any money.
There is nothing _________ done about it now, except _________ the police truth.
You’re too young _________ giving up _________ a career.
Sheryl forgot ______ her purse, so I lent her ten dollars.
I completely forgot ______ here when I was a kid. But now I remember! My parents brought me here when I was three.
Lydia really regrets _____ out of high school. She has really had to struggle to make a living because of that decision.
I regret _____ you that Mr. Smith has passed away.
Did you remember _____ your swimsuit? Our vacation in Hawaii won't be much fun if you can't go swimming.
Do you remember _____ stuck in that elevator when we were in New York? I thought we would never get out of there!
If you can't find the key, try _____ the lock with something else, like a knife or a screwdriver.
She tried _____ him the terrible truth, but she just couldn't bring herself to do it.
It takes me hours ______ a letter.
We arrived just as the ceremony was about _____.
I find it comfortable ______ in my new house.
I would love _____ in London, but it is too expensive.
I’d rather ____ at home tonight than _____ to the cinema.
I don’t have time ______ people who hate me, cause i’m too busy ______ people who love me
There is no point in ______ a car if you never use it.
I would like ______ back in time and meet my great grandparents.

exerciseSets.title: Động từ nguyên mẫu và Danh động từ 3 (Thi online - 30 câu)

exercises.question: I completely forgot ____ you my electronic dictionary. I thought I had lost it.
There was no point in _____ angry, so I just smiled.
We spent the whole day ______ in the train station waiting for the last train to arrive.
We're looking forward ______ my grandparents this summer
It's worth _______an arragement before you go.
Mr. McDougall regretted ____ Denise, so he called her up and asked her to come back to the company.
He'll never forget _____ the Rolling Stones in concert!
We weren't sure if Sid was fit enough ______to the top of the mountain, but he was the first one there!
It took me forty minutes _______ to school.
There is no need ______ anything when you come to my birthday party. No food, no gifts - just bring yourself.
We stopped _____ something to eat at a little diner just next to the freeway.
It's so hot in here! I'd like ______ in my swimming pool right now.
She stopped ____, closed the book, laid it on the table, and turned off the light.
She said she couldn't see me. She was too busy ______ other things.
I was about _____ undressed when there was a knock on the door.
I tried _____ the exotic fruit durian while I was in Malaysia, but I didn't like it at all.
Hans has lived in England for over a year so he is used ______ on the left now.
All of the students need permission from their parents _____ on the field trip.
Would you like something __________?
I can not help_____ my nails when I am nervous.
She just keeps _____ the same mistake over and over again.
I have been trying _____ Steve, but I still haven't been able ___ in touch with him.
I spent hours ______ the book "Rich Dad, Poor Dad".
On the way home from work, he stopped ____ some groceries.
I’m tired. I’d rather not _____ out this evening, if you don’t mind.
Don't waste your time _______in the phone book. Just look the address up on the Internet.
Did you remember _____ the iron before we left the house?
I can't stand _______ with him.
I know I've met her before. I remember ______her at John's party last summer.
He finds it hard ______ English.
